steps.commit: feat: init project structure and index.html skeleton
steps.description: Created the app shell, documentation shell, README, and static callback helper.

steps.commit: feat: add Spotify OAuth PKCE flow
steps.description: Implemented Spotify OAuth 2.0 PKCE login, callback handling, and local token storage.

steps.commit: feat: fetch playlist tracks from Spotify API
steps.description: Added playlist ID parsing and paginated Spotify track fetching with duration data.
Added the split algorithm that keeps original order and fills Side A without cutting tracks.

steps.commit: feat: render Side A and Side B tracklists in UI
steps.description: Rendered Side A and Side B lists with track numbers, timestamps, artists, and durations.
Added Spotify playlist replacement and chunked append handling for playlists over 100 tracks.

steps.commit: feat: implement playback start via Spotify API
steps.description: Added Side A playback start using the Spotify player API.

steps.commit: feat: add real-time countdown timer for Side A
steps.description: Added the live Side A countdown and playback progress meter.

steps.commit: feat: auto-pause at Side A end and show flip banner
steps.description: Added automatic pause at Side A completion and the flip cassette banner.

steps.commit: feat: add Start Side B resume button
steps.description: Added Side B playback start after the cassette flip prompt.

steps.commit: feat: cassette tape visual progress bar
steps.description: Added cassette reel visuals with Side A, Side B, and live tape progress fills.

steps.commit: feat: dark mode UI and retro styling
steps.description: Applied the minimal dark monospace cassette-themed visual design.

steps.commit: fix: error handling for no active device
steps.description: Added user-facing recovery instructions when Spotify has no active playback device.
Added refresh-token handling and automatic retry for expired access tokens.

steps.commit: docs: add README with setup instructions
steps.description: Documented local setup, Spotify scopes, dynamic docs, and GitHub publishing commands.
